Find Clinical Trials You Actually Understand

We translate complex eligibility criteria into plain English, so you can quickly see if a trial might be right for you or someone you love.

How Clinical Trials Work

What Is a Clinical Trial?

Research studies that test new treatments, medications, or medical devices in volunteers.

Learn more →

What Are Trial Phases?

Trials go through 4 phases, from initial safety testing to large-scale effectiveness studies.

Learn more →

Is It Safe to Participate?

Every trial on ClinicalTrials.gov is reviewed by an independent ethics committee.

Learn more →

Be Notified When New Trials Open

Tell us your condition. We'll email you the moment a new recruiting trial opens that matches — with the eligibility explained in plain English.

We never sell your information. Unsubscribe any time. Read our privacy policy.
